name: Idle Chop Miner
description: Chop wood, gather resources, and grow your lumber empire in Idle Chop Miner! Start with simple tools, collect logs, and watch your production grow even while offline. Expand your operation by upgrading buildings, unlocking new areas, and hiring workers to automate progress. Customize your world with tree skins, character skins, and explore multiple maps. Combining idle and tycoon gameplay, this game lets you manage resources, improve facilities, and build a thriving operation at your own pace. Chop, upgrade, and expand your mining empire today!
